subject: WS1.6 retry permission check after queue cleared
body: Dim status: Twigged commit 5f158fa4 landed, active commit queue is empty, no git:index/head claim is active, and Fiery's graph-core claim is no longer listed. Verdant still has the P5 files claim including pnpm-lock. Per your hold directive, I have not retried. Please confirm whether WS1.6 one-file commit may retry now, or whether I should keep holding behind Verdant/graph-core green confirmation.
